description: Vaivora weapon effect data for Scout tree classes.

design_patterns.linear_proficiency: Buffs existing rotation without changing shape.
design_patterns.gap_filling: Adds damage sources during CD gaps or creates passive damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Carbine
effects: Ankle Shot Skill Damage +50%
Trooper Charge Skill Damage +50%

level_4_effect.description: Number of Infinite Assault hit x2 against Boss monster. Channeling duration +1s when defeating target during Infinite Assault (Max 10 seconds).

design_analysis.reasoning: +50% skill damage on two core skills. Boss hit doubling at Level 4.

proc_mechanic.name: Carpet Bombing
effects: Throw grenades into nearby area every 0.25 seconds
Damaging 50% of Granata's current level skill factor
Carpet Bombing damage halved to Boss and Character

design_analysis.reasoning: Taglio triggers passive grenade barrage at Granata SFR. Area damage during other casts.

proc_mechanic.name: Critical Edge
effects: Minimum Hexen Dropper Critical Rate +40%
Hexen Dropper Final Damage at Critical Hit +60%

design_analysis.reasoning: Guaranteed crit + crit FD bonus on Hexen Dropper. Direct burst amplification.

passive_bonuses: Decreases cooldown of R.I.P by 10 seconds
Decreases cooldown of Mozambique Drill by 10 seconds

proc_mechanic.name: Cryolite Bullet
effects: Applies Freeze Bullet to R.I.P

level_4_effect.description: 1 stack of [Overheating] buff changes to 1 stack of [Outrage] buff when Outrage is cast (Maximum stack of Outrage buff: 30)

design_analysis.reasoning: CD reduction on two core skills + Freeze application. Tightens rotation.

proc_mechanic.name: Cursed Dagger
effects: Applies 4 stack of Keletihan debuff in current level
Applies [Cursed Dagger] debuff
Cursed Dagger gives equal damage with Luka of current level
Duration of Cursed Dagger: 10 seconds

design_analysis.reasoning: Luka auto-applies Keletihan stacks + Cursed Dagger DoT (Luka damage for 10s). Passive damage after burst.

proc_mechanic.name: Ecliptic Blades
effects: Throw equal number of daggers as [Pocket Knife] to the front by Climax
Skill Factor: 25% of Climax
Number of consecutive hits = number of daggers thrown (Max 10)
Maximum Target: 10

design_analysis.reasoning: Climax gains bonus dagger throw scaling with Pocket Knife count. Burst amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Empowering
effects: Increases Physical, Magic ATK of Over-Reinforce's party members additionally +2.5%

level_4_effect.description: Enchant Aura attack cycle and SP consume cycle decreases by half

design_analysis.reasoning: Party ATK buff increase + Enchant Aura efficiency. Support amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Gasp Up
effects: Apply [Gasp Up] debuff for 30 seconds
Debuff target creates [Covert] every 1 second (visible only to caster)
Increases buff stack by 1 every time caster steps the [Covert]
Stealth, Movement Speed during buff +10, max 5 stacks
Removes debuff and attacks 5 hits with pierce property when striking [Gasp Up] target with Assassin skill
Increases number of [Gasp Up] hits = [Covert] stack count
Skill factor is 46.5% of Piercing Heart
Gasp Up debuff Cooldown: 30 seconds
Only applies to boss and character

design_analysis.reasoning: Creates stealth-and-stalk minigame that builds stacks for burst. Fills downtime between Assassin CDs with positioning gameplay + delayed burst.

proc_mechanic.name: Law of the Jungle
effects: Each attack skill increases duration of Jaguar Stance by 2.5 seconds
The increasing value of Jaguar Stance Final Damage is elevated

level_4_effect.description: Receives [Aweslaught] effect for 10 seconds when using [Jaguar Stance]. * Aweslaught: All Jaguar skill attack becomes critical. * Player becomes [Stealth] while [Aweslaught] persists, removed after first attack. * [Aweslaught] Stealth status is not removed when receiving attacks.

design_analysis.reasoning: Extends Jaguar Stance duration per attack + guaranteed crit burst window at Level 4.

proc_mechanic.name: Phantom Blade
effects: Change 3 basic attacks after Knife Throw to Throw Dagger (10 seconds)
Skill factor of Throw Dagger is 60% of Knife Throw at current level
Damage for 3 seconds after throwing third dagger +30%

design_analysis.reasoning: Converts basic attacks into Throw Daggers after Knife Throw. Fills basic attack gaps with skill-level damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Rapid Growth
effects: Apply [Growth] buff to target for 12 seconds
[Growth]: Final Damage +10%
Size that Swells by Swell Body doubles

design_analysis.reasoning: +10% FD buff application via Swell Body. Party support amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Renovate Trigger
effects: Basic Pistol attack factor during Limacon buff +200%
Basic Pistol attack speed during Limacon buff +40%

level_4_effect.description: Basic Attack Speed of Pistol during Limacon buff changed to +60%. Maximum Serial Bullet buff stacks +30.

design_analysis.reasoning: +200% basic attack factor during Limacon. Turns basic attacks into main damage source.

passive_bonuses: Damage received increases after casting Rampage, Removes Cannot Evade Damage Received effect

proc_mechanic.name: Sabotage
effects: Additional attack activates per attack when casting Rampage
Skill factor = current level Rampage
Number of additional targets: 18

level_4_effect.description: Blindfire Final Damage +100%. Mangle Final damage +100%.

design_analysis.reasoning: Rampage gains AoE splash (18 targets) per hit. Direct AoE amplification.

skill_level_bonuses: All Shinobi skills except Bunshin no Jutsu +1
passive_bonuses: Summon 1 shadow clone when equipped with 1+ Bunshin no Jutsu skill level

proc_mechanic.name: Shadow Clone
effects: Duration: Infinite
Cannot inflict basic attack, copies Shinobi skill of the original
Does not consume HP/SP
Stackable with Clone summoned by Bunshin no Jutsu
Shadow clone copies cloaking

design_analysis.reasoning: Permanent shadow clone that copies all Shinobi skills without HP/SP cost. Autonomous damage multiplier.

passive_bonuses: Decreases Cooldown of Westraid by 25 seconds

proc_mechanic.name: Speedloader
effects: Stacks 3 [Sheriff: Reload] buff per every 5 seconds when equipped
When 10 [Sheriff: Reload] is stacked and Westraid is casted, consume all stacks and reset Cooldown of [Aiming Shot]

design_analysis.reasoning: Passive reload stacking → Aiming Shot CD reset. Increases burst frequency.

proc_mechanic.name: Superstring
effects: Apply number of targets linked as follows for Joint Penalty shared damage:
(Number of target+1) / 2
(Minimum 2 targets)

design_analysis.reasoning: Modifies Joint Penalty target formula for better shared damage scaling. Support utility.
